title: Purely Molten Slovakian Chicken Pilaf
description: A light and flavorful Slovakian dish featuring chicken bouillon powder and caramelized onions, this pilaf is a delicious and Jain-friendly option for a weeknight dinner. It has a rich, winey flavor without any actual wine.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chicken bouillon powder and stir for 1 minute.
Add the rinsed rice and stir for 2 minutes.
Add the caramelized onions, salt, and pepper, and stir for 1 minute.
Add the water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes.
Turn off the heat and let it sit for 5 minutes.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
To caramelize the onions, heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a pan over low heat and cook the onions for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
